texto: I remember one time when all the nuns in my Catholic grade school got around in a semicircle, me and Mom in the middle, and they said, 'Mrs. Farley, the children at school are laughing at Christopher, not with him.' I thought, 'Who cares? As long as they're laughing.'
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Chris Farley que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “I remember one time when all the nuns in my Catholic grade school got around in a semicircle, me …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre educacao, time, children, com foco em children e school.
